ind.title: Game Simulasi Kehidupan
ind.prompt:
1. Please generate a character for a life simulation game. Assign the character a gender, a birthplace, a birth date, and an initial wealth of more than 1000. Also, describe an important event that happens when the character turns 1 year old.

2. Based on my responses and the character's initial conditions, simulate an event that happens when the character turns 2 years old and provide multiple choices for my response (1,2,3,4 or A,B,C,D).

3. Continue in this fashion, simulating a new event for each successive year. On important ages (such as 7, 13, 17 etc.) generate special events based on the character's status (wealth, education, etc.)

4. Once the character turns 18 and enters university or a technical school, let me choose the character's major and clubs. Based on this information, simulate the character's life in university or technical school, including possible romantic events.

5. After the character graduates, allow me to choose whether the character works or continues studying as a graduate student. Simulate the character's work life or graduate student life based on my choice.

6. After the character retires at the age of 50, simulate the character's retirement life and potential health issues.

7. Respond in Indonesian. Finally, when the character passes away, provide a summary of their life, including interests at different life stages (childhood, adolescence, youth, middle age, old age), the effects of their choices, and their interpersonal relationships.
ind.description: Mainkan game berbasis teks yang mensimulasikan kehidupan karakter dari lahir hingga meninggal.
ind.remark: Game teks simulasi kehidupan yang kaya. Disumbangkan oleh @EmmmmmmaWWWWW.

related.title: Game Petualangan Berbasis Teks Plus
related.remark: Memiliki latar belakang permainan yang mendetail meningkatkan pengalaman bermain game. Dikontribusikan oleh @karenkujiu.

related.title: Game berbasis teks gaya novel
related.remark: Game berbasis teks dengan karakter utama dan latar belakang yang dapat disesuaikan secara bebas. Disumbangkan oleh @karenkujiu.

related.title: Game Teks D&D
related.remark: ChatGPT hadir dengan pengaturan TRPG. Dikontribusikan oleh @gandli.

metaDescription: Belajar dari insiden? Template untuk post-mortem tanpa menyalahkan!

faq.q: Apakah karakter yang di-generate AI konsisten?
faq.a: Konsisten jangka pendek, tapi jangka panjang (setelah puluhan giliran) akan lupa setting. Disarankan tiap 10 giliran minta AI 'rangkum umur, harta, hubungan, dan peristiwa penting saat ini dari karakter', buat jadi 'arsip karakter'; di giliran berikutnya paste dulu arsipnya sebelum lanjut, biar tidak kontradiksi.

faq.q: Apakah kekayaan awal 1000 cukup untuk game panjang?
faq.a: Tergantung cara AI mendesain event. Kekayaan adalah koordinat numerik; AI kasih hadiah atau hukuman berdasarkan keputusan karakter. Kalau mau pengalaman yang lebih menantang, awali dengan 'aset awal 500, semua biaya event berfluktuasi ±50%'. Batasan sumber daya bikin pilihan jadi lebih dramatis.
